modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be no spelling errors and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to connect to work computer via Remote Desktop from personal PC.

full_description_text: User attempts to use Remote Desktop Protocol. Connection to work computer fails. This issue occurs on a personal Windows computer. User requires assistance to resolve the connection problem.
short_description: Unable to connect to work computer via Remote Desktop from personal PC.
description: User attempts to use Remote Desktop Protocol. Connection to work computer fails. This issue occurs on a personal Windows computer. User requires assistance to resolve the connection problem.
